task.objective: Prevent authoritative plain-object keys from being altered, discarded, or converted into prototype mutation during structural cloning before exact semantic field validation.

requirements: Materialize governance/tasks/KERNEL-VS-CONV-003.json as the first task artifact.
Resolve KVS-BND-004.

Every own enumerable string key that passes structural scanning on an authoritative plain object must remain an own data-property key on the kernel-owned structural clone until semantic exact-field validation examines it.
Structural cloning must not silently discard the exact key: __proto__.
Structural cloning must not convert an authoritative own __proto__ data property into prototype mutation on the kernel-owned clone.
Do not clone caller-owned authoritative object properties through a pattern equivalent to: const cloned = {}; cloned[key] = value; when arbitrary caller-owned string keys are being materialized.
Use a prototype-safe object materialization strategy.
Do not add a general serialization framework.
Do not add an external dependency.
Exact known-field semantic validation must still reject unknown fields.
An own enumerable __proto__ property on the root kernel input must be rejected as an unknown field.
Prefer KernelBoundaryError issue category UNEXPECTED_FIELD at path $.__proto__.
An own enumerable __proto__ property on a nested authoritative record must also survive cloning until exact-field validation rejects it at the correct relative path.
Add focused tests for root own enumerable __proto__ with string value.
Add focused tests for root own enumerable __proto__ with null value.
Add focused tests for root __proto__ created through JSON.parse-compatible data-property semantics.
Add focused tests for evaluation own enumerable __proto__.
Add focused tests for Observation own enumerable __proto__.
Add focused tests for Rule effect own enumerable __proto__.
Add focused tests for Evidence Contract selection provenance own enumerable __proto__.
Each unknown __proto__ case must fail through KernelBoundaryError and must not be silently accepted.
Assert deterministic issue category and relative input path.
Repeated evaluation of the same malformed __proto__ input must produce the same issue category and path.

Add a regression proving an otherwise valid null-prototype plain input record remains supported where the existing boundary intentionally accepts plain objects with Object.prototype or null prototype.
Preserve caller-input isolation.
Do not mutate or freeze the caller input while fixing the clone.
Preserve safe authoritative Array indexed cloning.
Preserve non-ordinary Array prototype rejection.
Preserve Proxy rejection before trap-capable inspection.
Preserve all Proxy trap execution counters at zero.
Preserve sparse Array and accessor-backed Array rejection.
Preserve exact reserved Rule rejection of: KERNEL_EVIDENCE_REQUIREMENT_MISSING.
Preserve HARN_ Rule reason-code rejection.
Preserve Observation declared-evaluation-scope validation.
Preserve Claim-is-not-Evidence behavior.
Preserve exact Observation satisfaction.
Preserve Verdict precedence and lower-precedence reason retention.
Preserve deterministic identities, Evidence Lineage, and deep bundle immutability.

requiredInvariants: Unknown own enumerable __proto__ authoritative fields cannot disappear during structural cloning.
Structural cloning does not invoke inherited __proto__ setter behavior for caller-owned keys.
Exact known-field validation observes the preserved unknown key and rejects it.
Every malformed __proto__ regression exits through KernelBoundaryError.
Existing Proxy and Array boundary regressions remain green.
No production package outside contracts and kernel exists.
No repository, execution, verification, Policy runtime, adapter, delivery, network, or inference path is introduced.
